src/auth/session.py:57 - [High] Token verified after use

`current_user_id` is read from `session.user_id` before the JWT signature is
validated on line 64. A request with a forged session cookie reaches the
authorization check with attacker-chosen state.

**Suggestion:** Move the `verify_jwt(session.token)` call to the very top of
`load_session()`; bail out before touching any session fields.

=============

src/api/billing.py:142 - [Medium] Off-by-one in invoice pagination

`offset = page * PAGE_SIZE` with 1-indexed pages skips the first page
entirely — `?page=1` returns invoices 50–99 instead of 0–49.

**Suggestion:** Use `(page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE`, and add a test that asserts
`page=1` returns the first PAGE_SIZE rows.

=============

tests/api/test_billing.py:18 - [Nit] Test name doesn't describe behavior

`test_billing_1` doesn't say what's being tested — when it fails, the report
gives no clue about which behavior regressed.

**Suggestion:** Rename to `test_invoice_pagination_includes_first_page`.
